component.name: GrooveForge
component.summary: Cross-platform MIDI synthesizer and VST3 host

description.p: GrooveForge connects to physical MIDI keyboards, hosts VST3 plugins, and features a built-in multi-timbral synthesizer with vocoder support and real-time Jam Mode with scale locking across multiple plugin slots.
Features include a drag-and-drop plugin rack, per-slot soundfont selection, advanced CC mapping for hardware knobs and sliders, and project file save/restore for complete rack configurations.
